speaker: MATT
raw_text: Sorry, piercing damage, not necrotic. So as the bone shards go slamming into each of you, that completes the dragon's turn. Now everybody please roll initiative. (groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I would be near the window where I could kind of see-- what's your name, Ar-Can?

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Arkhan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Arkhan?

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say for the purposes of this--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He can just move with me, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This will be tiny Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan where are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Near the downstairs windows where I can see--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is so intense!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right here there's small slits, they're all armored up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh they're armored up, all right, so then I'm upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, okay. We'll put that there. So we'll say for the purposes of this you guys would be--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't believe we're fighting the fucking Briarwoods again!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: That's not the Death Knight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: It's her dude?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. So.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's Lord Briarwood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now that we're set, thank you for your patience. So what did you roll, you and your gloomstalker?

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Well, me get not-- him not-- it not so good. I had a 27. Gloomstalker 11. I'm trying to be-- give the proper gender-specific...

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: They?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Rolled an 11. Well, actually no. Wait, hold on. They would benefit from my Aura of Protection.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: So they would have a 15, I would have a 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's with their plus six? The gloomstalker gets a plus six dexterity saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: Oh, plus six! I'm looking at the dex modifier which is plus three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. Says under saving throws, dex plus six. Wait, does it? No, it's dex plus eight. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Take it.

preceding_turns.speaker: JOE
preceding_turns.text: So then, it-- they had a 20. I had a 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You both succeeded on the save so you take half damage which is only 26 points of necrotic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's solid.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Good to know. All right, that ends your turn. With that, it is now Delilah's turn. She rolled a 19 for initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: With my sharpshooter, she doesn't get any additional cover or anything. Okay, so I'm going to sharpshooter Delilah with one of my needle arrows that I've been hanging onto for a gajillion years. So that is a 25 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25 to hit? Yeah, even with Shield, she couldn't stop that. That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Okay. Good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is she aiming for the dragon?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, Delilah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Big D.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that sneak attack because she didn't know I was there, technically? Oh, Grog's standing right there!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog's in melee with the dragon. I'll say because she was not aware of you, they were only aware of him, it's sneak attack. It's not a crit; it's not a surprise attack, but you get sneak attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (counting) 31.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 31. All right, 31 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no, 41 because I was sharpshootering.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then that one definitely doesn't hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But it wasn't in the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, but it still was a roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17? Nope, that misses. As you lean through the window, you release the first arrow, and as Delilah's up there, both clutching the necklace and has her hand out with this wand, you hit her hand with the arrow. (snarls) Looks over and looks down at the window, right towards you, and there's a moment of recognition as she sees you. As you fire the second arrow, she dodges it and goes, "I remember you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (scared noises) I'm going to use my bonus action to hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you duck off to the side of the window.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not that it matters, but I'm going to roll for stealth. That did nothing. 21? Nope, 31, because I still haven't cast Hunter's Mark.
